title: NonoCapabilityManifest
description: Capability manifest consumed by the nono CLI (nono run --config <manifest>.json)

allow_read.description: Absolute paths the sandboxed process may read. Paths must exist at manifest-build time.

allow_write.description: Absolute paths the sandboxed process may write. Paths must exist at manifest-build time.

deny.description: macOS-only (Seatbelt) deny rules. Ignored on Linux.

access.description: Paths or path-prefixes denied for any access. macOS Seatbelt only.

unlink.description: Paths or path-prefixes denied for deletion. macOS Seatbelt only.

allow_domain.description: Allowlisted hostnames or *.suffix wildcard domains. CIDR ranges are not supported.
